---
title: "Fertilzier-N reduction relationship"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
years_curr <- 2006:2023

df_basin_input_forWQ <- read_csv(here("data/common_inputs_basin.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(Management_FertilizerUse_kgm2 = Management_FertilizerUse_kg / `LandCover_m2_all cult`)

WQtraining <- read_csv(here("data/RiverNitrateData_EKSRB.csv"))
                       
 
gamma_table <- df_basin_input_forWQ %>% left_join(WQtraining) %>% filter(Year %in% years_curr)

head(gamma_table)
                      
```

1) Prepare the calibration dataset (build the exact predictors your WQ model expects)
```{r}
# 1) Build the WQ predictors and N0 (no-fert baseline)
df_cal <- gamma_table %>%
  mutate(
    # Basin area + fractions (consistent with your model)
    BasinArea_m2 = `LandCover_m2_all cult` + LandCover_m2_grassPastureHay + LandCover_m2_developed,
    dev_frac  = LandCover_m2_developed / BasinArea_m2,
    cult_frac = `LandCover_m2_all cult` / BasinArea_m2
  ) %>%
  arrange(Year)

# 2) Add precip percentile change (must match your training construction)
ec <- ecdf(df_cal$Climate_precip_m)
df_cal <- df_cal %>%
  mutate(
    precip_percentile       = ec(Climate_precip_m),
    precip_percentileChange = coalesce(precip_percentile - lag(precip_percentile), 0)
  )

# 3) Compute baseline prediction N0 from the no-fert model
df_cal <- df_cal %>%
  mutate(
    N0 = pmax(0, as.numeric(predict(wq_model_mlr, newdata = .)))
  )

# 4) Join fertilizer reference (baseline) and compute ratio r
df_cal <- df_cal %>%
  left_join(fert_ref_by_year %>% select(Year, Fert_ref_kg), by = "Year") %>%
  mutate(
    Fert_obs_kg = Management_FertilizerUse_kg,
    r = Fert_obs_kg / Fert_ref_kg
  )


df_cal %>% summarise(
  n = n(),
  any_na = any(is.na(NitrateFlux_kg) | is.na(N0) | is.na(r)),
  r_min = min(r, na.rm=TRUE),
  r_max = max(r, na.rm=TRUE),
  N0_min = min(N0, na.rm=TRUE),
  N0_max = max(N0, na.rm=TRUE)
)

```
2) Fit gamma (elasticity) using log-ratio regression
```{r}
eps <- 1e-6

fit_dat <- df_cal %>%
  filter(is.finite(NitrateFlux_kg), is.finite(N0), is.finite(r),
         NitrateFlux_kg > 0, N0 > 0, r > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    y = log((NitrateFlux_kg + eps) / (N0 + eps)),
    x = log(r)
  )

# Fit through the origin (recommended: if r=1, multiplier should be 1 -> y=0)
fit_gamma <- lm(y ~ 0 + x, data = fit_dat)

summary(fit_gamma)
gamma_hat <- coef(fit_gamma)[["x"]]
gamma_hat


ggplot(fit_dat, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = gamma_hat, intercept = 0)
```


3) Quantify uncertainty (bootstrap across years)
```{r}
set.seed(1)
B <- 2000

gammas <- replicate(B, {
  samp <- fit_dat %>% slice_sample(n = n(), replace = TRUE)
  coef(lm(y ~ 0 + x, data = samp))[["x"]]
})

quantile(gammas, c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9), na.rm = TRUE)
quantile(gammas, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
```
